SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain

Interface ParticipantRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
InMemoryParticipantRepository
public interface ParticipantRepository
Port (interface) for reading and updating registered participant data.

Implementations live in the infrastructure sub-package. Application services depend only on this interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<RegisteredParticipant>
    findAll()
    Returns all currently registered participants.
    Optional<RegisteredParticipant>
    findById(String serverId)
    Look up a participant by its stable server identifier.
    void
    save(RegisteredParticipant participant)
    Persist a newly registered participant.
    void
    updateStatus(String serverId, NodeStatus status)
    Update the online/offline status of a participant.

  • Method Details

    • save

      void save(RegisteredParticipant participant)
      Persist a newly registered participant.
      Parameters:
      participant - the participant to store.

    • findAll

      List<RegisteredParticipant> findAll()
      Returns all currently registered participants.
      Returns:
      immutable snapshot of all participants.

    • findById

      Optional<RegisteredParticipant> findById(String serverId)
      Look up a participant by its stable server identifier.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the stable server ID (e.g. "server-1").
      Returns:
      the participant wrapped in an Optional, or empty if not found.

    • updateStatus

      void updateStatus(String serverId, NodeStatus status)
      Update the online/offline status of a participant.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server whose status changes.
      status - the new status.
